{{Quote|We need those walkers for our assault!|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Republic: The Battle of Jabiim">''[[Star Wars: Republic: The Battle of Jabiim]]''</ref>}}
The '''All Terrain Experimental Transport (AT-XT)''' was an experimental [[Armor/Legends|armored]] assault [[Walker/Legends|walker]] used by the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was a predecessor to the [[All Terrain Recon Transport/Legends|AT-RT]] and [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]], the latter of which was used extensively by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Description==
The AT-XT was equipped with twin [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] mounted under its chin and two long-range [[proton mortar]] launchers.<ref name="TCWg" />

Also, as a defensive measure, some units were equipped with a [[Plasma/Legends|plasma]] [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] capable of absorbing enemy fire for a short period of time. In spite of its reasonably slow max speed of seventy-five kilometers per hour, which was only fifteen kilometers per hour faster than the [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|AT-TE]], and five kilometers per hour faster than the normal speed of the [[All Terrain Recon Transport/Legends|AT-RT]], it was capable of demolishing entire columns of enemies.<ref name="TCWg" />

==History==
===The Dark Reaper Crisis===
AT-XTs played a very important role in bringing the [[Dark Reaper]] Project to a halt. They fought during the battles of [[Rhen Var/Legends|Rhen Var]] and [[Thule/Legends|Thule]].<ref name="TCWg" />

===Design-influence===
[[File:ATXT.jpg|thumb|left|AT-XTs deployed with [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Kenobi's]] forces on [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]].]]

Although it was a highly effective combat vehicle, the AT-XT was never mass-produced as its [[Rothana Heavy Engineering/Legends|designers]] were constantly improving its design and combat capabilities. Even though it didn't see as much combat as the [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|AT-TE]] or [[All Terrain Recon Transport/Legends|AT-RT]], the design of the AT-XT would prove to be valuable to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] designers as an inspiration for the [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] walker that would be used extensively throughout the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

===Rebellion Era===
In addition to its design-legacy, various AT-XT models were retained in use by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], mostly for research and development purposes.

Even Rebellion forces eventually acquired the vehicles and used them in multiple sieges, challenging any garrisoned AT-STs present.<ref name="SWG:GU15" />
